page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct contrast between single-core and multi-core execution. The single-core CPU performance measured via stress-ng is strong, placing in the top 25%, while the Geekbench single-core score and single-threaded gzip compression fall into the average tier. However, multi-core and multi-threaded operations, such as stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression, rank in the weak or poor categories. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks also show weak performance, which impacts memory-intensive operations.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance offers a dedicated AMD EPYC hardware profile tailored for compute-bound tasks that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. Tradeoffs include limited memory capacity and lower multi-threaded scaling, making it less suitable for heavy database operations or large-scale parallel processing. It is best suited for workloads such as lightweight web serving, single-threaded applications, basic text processing, and small-scale LLM text generation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz, paired with 8.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates strong single-core CPU performance, though multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth are relatively weak. This hardware profile offers a cost-efficient option for compute-focused workloads that do not demand high memory density. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded applications, text processing, and small-scale language model text generation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7a.xlarge is a compute-optimized KVM instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core performance for lightweight workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and strong single-core performance for lightweight workloads.

Equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Delivers strong single-core CPU performance in benchmark testing
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Best suited for lightweight web serving and single-threaded tasks
